---
title: "sequence_districts"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
install.packages(c("tidyverse", "TraMineR", "WeightedCluster", "cluster", "factoextra", "viridis", "sf"), dependencies = TRUE)
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(TraMineR)
library(WeightedCluster)
library(cluster)
library(factoextra)
library(viridis)
library(sf)

# Veri yükleme
df <- read.csv("/Volumes/F/projects/2026/pop_districts/long_panel_pop.csv", 
               fileEncoding = "UTF-8-BOM")

geo <- st_read("/Volumes/F/projects/2026/pop_districts/TUR_ADM2.geojson")
```

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# STAGE 1: Overall population change 2007-2025
# González-Leonardo et al. (2023) replication — Turkish districts
# =============================================================================

# =============================================================================
# STAGE 1: Overall population change 2007-2025
# =============================================================================
library(tidyverse)
library(zoo)
library(TraMineR)
library(WeightedCluster)
library(cluster)
library(sf)

pop_change <- df %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2007, 2025)) %>%
  select(asdf_id, shapeName, NUTS_I, NUTS_II, year, population) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = year, values_from = population, names_prefix = "pop_") %>%
  mutate(total_change = (pop_2025 - pop_2007) / pop_2007 * 100)

# =============================================================================
# STAGE 2a: Yıllık değişim + smoothing + kategoriler
# =============================================================================
pop_annual <- df %>%
  arrange(asdf_id, year) %>%
  group_by(asdf_id) %>%
  mutate(pop_change = (population - lag(population)) / lag(population) * 100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(pop_change))

# Eşikleri veriden türet (1.5 SD)
mean_val <- mean(pop_annual$pop_change, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_val   <- sd(pop_annual$pop_change, na.rm = TRUE)

high_decline_threshold <- round(mean_val - 1.5 * sd_val, 1)  # -15.1
high_growth_threshold  <- round(mean_val + 1.5 * sd_val, 1)  # +15.6
decline_threshold      <- round((high_decline_threshold + (-0.5)) / 2, 1)  # -7.8
growth_threshold       <- round((0.5 + high_growth_threshold) / 2, 1)      #  8.1

# 3 yıllık hareketli ortalama
pop_smooth <- pop_annual %>%
  arrange(asdf_id, year) %>%
  group_by(asdf_id) %>%
  mutate(pop_change_smooth = rollmean(pop_change, k = 3, fill = NA, align = "center")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(pop_change_smooth))

# 6 kategori
pop_cat <- pop_smooth %>%
  mutate(state = case_when(
    pop_change_smooth <  decline_threshold                                       ~ "1_decline",
    pop_change_smooth >= decline_threshold      & pop_change_smooth < -0.5      ~ "2_moderate_decline",
    pop_change_smooth >= -0.5                   & pop_change_smooth <  0.5      ~ "3_stable",
    pop_change_smooth >=  0.5                   & pop_change_smooth < growth_threshold  ~ "4_moderate_growth",
    pop_change_smooth >= growth_threshold       & pop_change_smooth < high_growth_threshold ~ "5_growth",
    pop_change_smooth >= high_growth_threshold                                  ~ "6_high_growth"
  ))

table(pop_cat$state)
```

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# STAGE 2b: Sequence objesi oluştur
# =============================================================================

# Geniş formata çevir (her yıl bir sütun)
seq_wide <- pop_cat %>%
  select(asdf_id, year, state) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = year, values_from = state)

# Kontrol
cat("Boyut:", nrow(seq_wide), "ilçe x", ncol(seq_wide)-1, "yıl\n")

# Sequence objesi
seq_data <- seq_wide %>% select(-asdf_id)

pop_seq <- seqdef(
  seq_data,
  states = c("1_decline", "2_moderate_decline", "3_stable",
             "4_moderate_growth", "5_growth", "6_high_growth"),
  labels = c("Decline", "Moderate Decline", "Stable",
             "Moderate Growth", "Growth", "High Growth"),
  cpal = c("#8B0000", "#E07070", "#FFFFB3", "#90EE90", "#228B22", "#004d00")
)

# Index plot — her ilçenin trajektörisi
seqiplot(pop_seq,
         title = "District Population Trajectories (2009-2024)",
         with.legend = TRUE,
         idxs = 1:nrow(seq_wide))

# Dağılım plot
seqdplot(pop_seq,
         title = "Annual State Distribution (2009-2024)",
         with.legend = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# STAGE 2c: DHD mesafe matrisi + Ward clustering
# =============================================================================

# DHD mesafe matrisi (makale ile aynı)
dist_matrix <- seqdist(pop_seq, method = "DHD")

# Ward clustering
ward_clust <- hclust(as.dist(dist_matrix), method = "ward.D2")

# Dendrogram
plot(ward_clust,
     labels = FALSE,
     main = "Dendrogram — Ward Clustering",
     xlab = "", sub = "")
```

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# STAGE 2d: Optimal cluster sayısı — Silhouette + Point Biserial + Hubert's D
# Makale: bu üç kriteri kullanıyor
# =============================================================================

library(WeightedCluster)

# WeightedCluster ile tüm kriterler
clust_quality <- as.clustrange(ward_clust,
                               diss = as.dist(dist_matrix),
                               ncluster = 8)

summary(clust_quality, max.rank = 2)

# Plot
plot(clust_quality, stat = c("ASW", "PBC", "HSD"), norm = "zscore")
```

```{r}
# Plot — doğru stat isimleriyle
plot(clust_quality, stat = c("ASW", "PBC", "HC"), norm = "zscore")
```

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# STAGE 2e: Cluster çözümlerini karşılaştır
# =============================================================================

# k=3, 4, 5, 6 için cluster ata ve ilçe sayılarına bak
for (k in 3:6) {
  clusters <- cutree(ward_clust, k = k)
  cat("\nk =", k, ":\n")
  print(table(clusters))
}
```

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# STAGE 2e: k=4 ile cluster ata
# =============================================================================

clusters_4 <- cutree(ward_clust, k = 4)

# Cluster atamasını seq_wide'a ekle
cluster_df <- data.frame(
  asdf_id  = seq_wide$asdf_id,
  cluster  = clusters_4
)

table(cluster_df$cluster)

# Her cluster için dağılım grafikleri (makale Figure 3 gibi)
seqdplot(pop_seq,
         group = clusters_4,
         main = "State Distribution by Cluster",
         with.legend = TRUE,
         border = NA)
```

```{r}
# 1.5 SD ile eşikleri yeniden belirle
high_decline_threshold <- round(mean_val - 1.5 * sd_val, 1)  # ~-15.1
high_growth_threshold  <- round(mean_val + 1.5 * sd_val, 1)  # ~+15.6

decline_threshold <- round((high_decline_threshold + (-0.5)) / 2, 1)
growth_threshold  <- round((0.5 + high_growth_threshold) / 2, 1)

cat("Yeni eşikler (1.5 SD):\n")
cat("High decline     < ", high_decline_threshold, "\n")
cat("Decline          ", high_decline_threshold, " to ", decline_threshold, "\n")
cat("Moderate decline ", decline_threshold, " to -0.5\n")
cat("Stable           -0.5 to 0.5\n")
cat("Moderate growth   0.5 to ", growth_threshold, "\n")
cat("Growth           ", growth_threshold, " to ", high_growth_threshold, "\n")
cat("High growth      > ", high_growth_threshold, "\n")

# Kategori dağılımını test et
pop_cat_test <- pop_smooth %>%
  mutate(state = case_when(
    pop_change_smooth < high_decline_threshold                                    ~ "1_high_decline",
    pop_change_smooth >= high_decline_threshold & pop_change_smooth < decline_threshold  ~ "2_decline",
    pop_change_smooth >= decline_threshold      & pop_change_smooth < -0.5        ~ "3_moderate_decline",
    pop_change_smooth >= -0.5                   & pop_change_smooth <  0.5        ~ "4_stable",
    pop_change_smooth >=  0.5                   & pop_change_smooth < growth_threshold   ~ "5_moderate_growth",
    pop_change_smooth >= growth_threshold       & pop_change_smooth < high_growth_threshold ~ "6_growth",
    pop_change_smooth >= high_growth_threshold                                    ~ "7_high_growth"
  ))

table(pop_cat_test$state)
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
